basic_details.job_title: AIIMS Rishikesh Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online for Counsellor, Nurse, Data Manager Posts
basic_details.organization_name: All India Institute of Medical Sciences, Rishikesh
basic_details.short_information: All India Institute of Medical Sciences, Rishikesh (AIIMS Rishikesh) has released an official notification for the recruitment of 4 Counsellor, Nurse, Data Manager Posts. Interested and eligible candidates can apply by sending their application via Email. The last date to send the application email is 22-07-2026.

age_limit.details: Please refer to the official notification for age limit details.

qualification.education_qualification: Graduate in Psychology/Social work/Sociology (preferable: Masters in above disciplines), ANM (preferable: GNM / BSc Nursing), Graduate (preferably with qualification / experience in computer applications)
qualification.details: Counsellor: Graduate in Psychology/Social work/Sociology (preferable: Masters in above disciplines) Nurse: ANM (preferable: GNM / BSc Nursing) Data Manager: Graduate (preferably with qualification / experience in computer applications)

salary_details.details: Counsellor: Minimum 20,000/- per month Nurse: Minimum 15,000/- per month Data Manager: Minimum 15,000/- per month

selection_process: Application Screening Walk-in Interview Document Verification
how_to_apply: Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Prepare your application with complete bio-data including personal details, educational qualifications, and experience.
Attach self-attested copies of all required documents such as educational certificates, experience certificates, ID proof, and recent passport-size photographs.
Clearly mention the post applied for in the subject line of the email.
Send the complete application to the official email address mentioned in the notification.
Ensure the email is sent before the last date: 22-07-2026.
Keep a copy of the sent email for future reference.

all_official_links.label: Download AIIMS Rishikesh Job 2026 Notification PDF

rows.all_india_institute_of_medical_sciences_: Graduate in Psychology/Social work/Sociology (preferable: Masters in above disciplines), ANM (preferable: GNM / BSc Nursing), Graduate (preferably with qualification / experience in computer applications)

content_sections.heading: AIIMS Rishikesh Vacancy 2026 Notification PDF
content_sections.text: Candidates who are interested in applying for the AIIMS Rishikesh Recruitment 2026 should first download and carefully read the official notification PDF. The notification contains complete details about vacancy distribution, eligibility criteria, age limit, stipend/salary, selection process, important dates, and application instructions. Reading the official document is important to ensure that you meet all requirements before submitting the application form. Download AIIMS Rishikesh Job 2026 Notification PDF

content_sections.heading: AIIMS Rishikesh Recruitment 2026 - Eligibility Criteria
content_sections.text: Counsellor: Graduate in Psychology/Social work/Sociology (preferable: Masters in above disciplines) Nurse: ANM (preferable: GNM / BSc Nursing) Data Manager: Graduate (preferably with qualification / experience in computer applications)

content_sections.heading: AIIMS Rishikesh Recruitment 2026 - Age Limit
content_sections.text: Please refer to the official notification for age limit details.

content_sections.heading: AIIMS Rishikesh Recruitment 2026 - Salary / Stipend
content_sections.text: Counsellor: Minimum 20,000/- per month Nurse: Minimum 15,000/- per month Data Manager: Minimum 15,000/- per month

content_sections.heading: AIIMS Rishikesh Recruitment 2026 - Selection Process
content_sections.text: Application Screening Walk-in Interview Document Verification

content_sections.heading: How to Apply
content_sections.text: Read the official notification carefully before applying. Prepare your application with complete bio-data including personal details, educational qualifications, and experience. Attach self-attested copies of all required documents such as educational certificates, experience certificates, ID proof, and recent passport-size photographs. Clearly mention the post applied for in the subject line of the email. Send the complete application to the official email address mentioned in the notification. Ensure the email is sent before the last date: 22-07-2026. Keep a copy of the sent email for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the AIIMS Rishikesh recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date to submit your application via email is 22nd July 2026. Ensure your application reaches the concerned authority before this deadline.

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are available for the AIIMS Rishikesh posts?
faq.answer: There are a total of 4 vacancies announced for the positions of Counsellor, Nurse, and Data Manager in this recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q3. What is the application mode for AIIMS Rishikesh recruitment?
faq.answer: The application for these posts needs to be submitted via email. Candidates are advised to follow the instructions carefully for submission.

faq.question: Q4. What is the salary offered for the AIIMS Rishikesh posts?
faq.answer: The salary ranges from Rs. 15,000 to Rs. 20,000 per month, depending on the specific post and its requirements.

faq.question: Q5. What are the educational qualifications required for the posts?
faq.answer: Qualifications vary by post, including Graduate degrees in Psychology/Social work/Sociology for Counsellor, ANM for Nurse, and a Graduate degree with computer applications for Data Manager.

faq.question: Q6. Is there any application fee for AIIMS Rishikesh recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) in the official notification.

faq.question: Q7. What is the selection process for these positions?
faq.answer: The selection process involves application screening, followed by a walk-in interview and document verification.

faq.question: Q8. Where is AIIMS Rishikesh located?
faq.answer: AIIMS Rishikesh is located in Rishikesh, Uttarakhand, with the pincode 249203.

faq.question: Q9. Are there any age relaxations mentioned?
faq.answer: The official notification does not specify any age limits or relaxations for these posts.

faq.question: Q10. What documents are required for the application?
faq.answer: Candidates need to attach self-attested copies of educational certificates, experience certificates, ID proof, and recent passport-size photographs with their application.
